abstract.t:
This document specifies Classic McEliece, a Key Encapsulation Method (KEM) designed for IND-CCA2 security, even against quantum computers.
About This Document
This note is to be removed before publishing as an RFC.
Status information for this document may be found at https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/draft-josefsson-mceliece/.
Source for this draft and an issue tracker can be found at https://gitlab.com/jas/ietf-mceliece.
